field_values.action_summary: Following the naval victory, John Carter transfers Princess Dejah Thoris to the Heliumite flagship. She is celebrated as a hero by her people. Amidst the celebration, Carter remains focused on the mission, deciding to stay with the Tharks to complete the land campaign rather than resting.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of the reunion; Close-ups of Dejah's emotional reaction; Low angle hero shots of Carter and Tars Tarkas
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Dejah Thoris physical state (transition from exhaustion to relief)
Visual presence of Thark fleet in background horizon
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH026_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the emotional resolution of the naval victory by reuniting Dejah Thoris with her people on the Heliumite flagship. The scene must transition from the high-energy relief of a successful rescue to the grounded, tactical determination of John Carter as he commits to the land campaign alongside the Tharks.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- tars_tarkas
- Heliumite Sailors

## Required Environments
- The Heliumite Flagship (Deck)

## Continuity Constraints
- Dejah Thoris physical condition (exhaustion vs. relief)
- Presence of the Thark fleet in the background horizon

## Beat List
- BT001: Transfer of Dejah Thoris to the flagship
- BT002: Celebration of the Princess
- BT003: Carter's tactical decision
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
